name: scene-get-data
title: Scene / Get Data
description: This tool retrieves the list of root GameObjects in the specified scene. Use 'scene-list-opened' tool to get the list of all opened scenes.

parameters.name: openedSceneName
parameters.description: Name of the opened scene. If empty or null, the active scene will be used.

parameters.name: includeRootGameObjects
parameters.description: If true, includes root GameObjects in the scene data.

parameters.name: includeChildrenDepth
parameters.description: Determines the depth of the hierarchy to include.

parameters.name: includeBounds
parameters.description: If true, includes bounding box information for GameObjects.

parameters.name: includeData
parameters.description: If true, includes component data for GameObjects.
